stt.heardError: Santabi, lang tarbogei ham. Uji ma use.
stt.micAccessError: Lang boi masuk hu mikrofon. Pareksa ma ijin.

error.passwordRequired: Hata sandi na ihaporluhon bani file .ania na terenkripsi
error.noSource: Lang dong sumber avatar na ibere (avatarUrl atap avatarData)

greetings.0: Horas! Sonaha ahu boi mangurupi ham sadari on?
greetings.1: Horas! Selamat datang! Aha ma na boi bahenonku bamu?
greetings.2: Oi baya! Malas tumang uhurhu marsahap pakon nassiam!
greetings.3: Horas! Ijon do ahu laho mangurupi. Aha do na porlu bamu?
greetings.4: Horas! Aha kabarmu? Sonaha ase boi ahu marguna?
